tasks.title: Create global tenant_cursors collection for round-robin
tasks.description: New Mongo collection tenant_cursors with single document {_id:global, last_tenant_id, last_picked_at}. Atomic findOneAndUpdate advances cursor in lease_batch. Handle empty-tenant and wrap-around cases.
acceptance_criteria: tenant_cursors collection created with single _id:global document
Atomic findOneAndUpdate used to advance cursor
Cursor wraps around when reaching end of tenant list

tasks.title: Per-tenant daily cap check in throttle_service
tasks.description: Add try_consume_tenant_daily_cap(tenant_user_id, limit) to server/app/services/throttle_service.py. Uses tenant_stats_daily keyed by (tenant_user_id, date_utc) with atomic $inc. Invoked in lease_batch before leasing; skip tenant on cap exhausted. Limit loaded from /api/mcp/tenant-quotas.
acceptance_criteria: lease_batch skips tenant when cap exhausted

tasks.title: Include allocation in register payload
tasks.description: Extend POST /api/mcp/register body so CRM learns container size and allocation: cpu_vcpu, ram_mb, sender_agents, extraction_agents, hygiene_eligible, daily_capacity. CRM persists on mcp_worker_instances.
acceptance_criteria: Register payload includes cpu_vcpu, ram_mb, sender_agents, extraction_agents, daily_capacity

tasks.title: Tenant quotas refresh loop
tasks.description: New server/app/services/quota_refresher.py calls GET /api/mcp/tenant-quotas every 15 min. Caches per-tenant daily_cap, per_hour_cap, plan_tier in process. throttle_service reads from cache. On auth failure, tries refresh-token once before alerting.
acceptance_criteria: throttle_service reads from cache never direct HTTP per send
Cache survives CRM transient outages up to 60 min

tasks.title: Per-tenant backlog counters in heartbeat
tasks.description: Compute per-tenant send_queue pending counts and include in heartbeat metrics.per_tenant_backlog = {tenant_user_id: count}. Cached 30s. Used by CRM Fleet Manager to detect unfair starvation patterns.
acceptance_criteria: Aggregation query uses existing (status, scheduled_for) index
